name: weather_coordinator_stateful
description: A state-aware weather and time information agent. It maintains user preferences for temperature units (Celsius/Fahrenheit) across a session and can delegate social interactions to sub-agents.

skills.name: Stateful Weather Check
skills.description: Retrieve current weather for specific cities with automatic unit conversion based on session-stored preferences.

skills.name: Unit Preference Management
skills.description: Set and update user preferences for temperature units (Celsius/Fahrenheit) in the session state.

skills.name: City Time Check
skills.description: Provide the current local time for supported cities like New York.
